title: Exit with errors not just logging error
body:
Several commands were logging errors but exiting with a 0
exit code.  This patch cleans these up.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body:
@rhatdan thank you for realizing that there would be more such instances. 

CI failure is because `logrus` is no longer needed. LGTM once that's resolved.

Restarted the failing test, hopefully just a flake
/lgtm
